test.name: 3: Käyttäjän navigointi kaikilla mahdollisilla sovelluksen sivuilla

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Click Link
kw.doc: Clicks a link identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Page Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Verifies the current page does not contain ``text``.
kw.msg: Current page does not contain text '//*[@id="root"]/div/h2'.

kw.name: Page Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Verifies the current page does not contain ``text``.
kw.msg: Current page does not contain text 'Project Detail'.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Page Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Verifies the current page does not contain ``text``.
kw.msg: Current page does not contain text 'Home'.

kw.name: Page Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Verifies the current page does not contain ``text``.
kw.msg: Current page does not contain text 'Projects'.

kw.name: Page Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Verifies the current page does not contain ``text``.
kw.msg: Current page does not contain text 'Project Detail'.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: 4: Edit toiminnon testaus, siirtyminen kortilta toiselle

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Click Link
kw.doc: Clicks a link identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.arg: Tämä rakennus sai alkunsa vuonna 2000, ja on käymässä läpi renevaatioita.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: Typing text 'Tämä rakennus sai alkunsa vuonna 2000, ja on käymässä läpi renevaatioita.' into text field 'id:description'.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.arg: Tämä rakennus sai alkunsa vuonna 2000, ja on käymässä läpi renevaatioita.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.
kw.msg: Verifying element 'id:description' contains exact text 'Tämä rakennus sai alkunsa vuonna 2000, ja on käymässä läpi renevaatioita.'.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: 5: Projektien tallennustoiminnon testaminen oikalla datalla, ikkunan kokona iPhone 12 Pro

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Click Link
kw.doc: Clicks a link identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: Retrying (Retry(total=2, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError('<urllib3.connection.HTTPConnection object at 0x00000112D09DACE0>: Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it')': /session/7035d46fbe094926155565bac1119878/screenshot
